label: PASS
rationale: MBR is being treated as a byte table, and CreateRow is not available on byte tables, so a non-success response to MBR.CreateRow is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: CreateRow is not available on byte tables, so successfully creating a row on the MBR byte table is not protocol-compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: DeleteRow SHALL NOT be successfully invoked on byte tables, so a non-success response to MBR.DeleteRow is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: DeleteRow SHALL NOT be successfully invoked on byte tables, so SUCCESS for MBR.DeleteRow is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The Opal AccessControl preconfiguration lists MBR associations for Get and Set, not CreateRow; GetACL fails when the InvokingID/MethodID combination does not exist, so INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: MBR/CreateRow is not an existing AccessControl association in the preconfiguration, and GetACL must fail when the InvokingID/MethodID combination does not exist; returning SUCCESS with an ACL is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The MBR/CreateRow association is absent from the Opal AccessControl preconfiguration, and AddACE fails when the InvokingID/MethodID combination does not exist, so INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: AddACE targets an MBR/CreateRow association that does not exist in the AccessControl preconfiguration, so a successful AddACE response is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The MBR/CreateRow association is not present in Opal AccessControl, and RemoveACE fails when the InvokingID/MethodID combination does not exist, so INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: RemoveACE targets an MBR/CreateRow association that does not exist, so returning SUCCESS is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: DeleteMethod fails when the InvokingID/MethodID combination does not exist, and the preconfigured MBR AccessControl rows include Get and Set but not CreateRow; INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: DeleteMethod targets a nonexistent MBR/CreateRow access-control association, so a successful DeleteMethod response is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The Opal AccessControl preconfiguration lists MBR Get and Set associations, not DeleteRow; GetACL fails when the InvokingID/MethodID combination does not exist, so INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: MBR/DeleteRow is not an existing AccessControl association, and GetACL must fail for nonexistent InvokingID/MethodID combinations; returning SUCCESS with an ACL is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The MBR/DeleteRow association is absent from the Opal AccessControl preconfiguration, and AddACE fails when the InvokingID/MethodID combination does not exist, so INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: AddACE targets an MBR/DeleteRow association that does not exist, so a successful AddACE response is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The MBR/DeleteRow association is not present in Opal AccessControl, and RemoveACE fails when the InvokingID/MethodID combination does not exist, so INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.

rationale: DeleteMethod fails when the InvokingID/MethodID combination does not exist, and MBR/DeleteRow is not present in the AccessControl preconfiguration; INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.
